nodes.label: AI as report comparison assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole solution generator without learning
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use AI to generate another solution. This is mostly for coding tasks.

nodes.label: AI adherence to user specifications
nodes.grounding_span: if the design have a carousel that displays the sponsors, where it automatically scrolls through each sponsor, and the AI's code attempts to improve it by adding a navigation control, then I will not use this

nodes.label: AI code quality and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was incapable of replicating the implementation, even though it found where it was and often modifies my existing code unnecessarily.

nodes.label: Independent coding for understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle any coding task on my own first, and then use the AI for improvements.

nodes.label: AI as mentor for learning
nodes.grounding_span: AI has became a mentor that shows me the way, and I've become reliant on it to learn how things work.

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced workload
nodes.grounding_span: it helps my workflow as it reduces the repetitive tasks I need to do.

nodes.label: Client success and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: this is not something my client wants.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: The comparison allows me to improve my code.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: This was a frustrating process because unrelated code was being modified and it completely broken the website.

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation for AI to speed workflow
nodes.grounding_span: Most likely getting more reliant on it as I figure that it's pretty good at it.

nodes.label: Independent-first then AI comparison approach
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle any coding task on my own first, and then use the AI for improvements.

nodes.label: Ongoing back-and-forth interaction with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I typically have an ongoing back and forth conversation with it.
